disclaimer.computerProvisioningWarning: <bold>Do not</bold> use Superbacked on computer that is not specifically provisioned for secret management (no data persistence or network connectivity) unless secret is already present on computer.
disclaimer.limitationOfLiability: Superbacked, Inc., along with its employees, operators and shareholders and the contributors and maintainers of its source code, cannot be held liable for lost or stolen secrets.
disclaimer.agree: I agree to above terms and accept underlying risks

featureDescriptionModal.detachedArchiveDescription: Detached archives encrypt files and folders using master keys embedded in blocks and are restored using blocks and passphrases providing multi-factor authentication.
featureDescriptionModal.standaloneArchiveDescription: Standalone archives encrypt files and folders using passphrases only and are restored without blocks providing single-factor authentication.

hiddenSecretDisclaimerModal.description: Hidden secrets use separate passphrases and are concealed in unused blockspace.
